examples: Perhaps it had been "ritually killed" at the end of its life, like other Bronze-Age objects.
I ritually write a column summarizing the new theories of each of my years.
Not for nothing is the speaker of the House of Commons ritually dragged unwillingly to his chair.
Under Islamic religious practices, Muslims cannot eat pork or animals that have not been ritually slaughtered.
But the ancient Egyptians would also, it is said, ritually bury redheaded men alive.
